title: Bridge drops data-entity primaryTable/fields on create
instruction: Create a public data entity (objectType=data-entity) over a small table, passing properties.primaryTable and properties.fields. Confirm the resulting AxDataEntityView has a non-empty <Fields> and a populated <ViewMetadata><DataSources> with a query rooted on the table -- not just an empty skeleton that happens to compile. Known TOOL_DEFECT as of 2026-06-30 (eval/corpus/runs/2026-06-30T19__L4-entity-security__fc090d0.json): XmlTemplateGenerator's data-entity path silently drops both properties, producing an empty entity with no datasource at all.
